title: Elbaf’s Past Turns Violent
description: On pages 1–3, this part follows Rocks D. Xebec, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, King Harald, Unknown person #3, Usopp as Elbaf’s history turns darker as older conflicts, powerful bloodlines, and the roots of hatred behind the present crisis come into focus.
scene: Elbaf’s history turns darker as older conflicts, powerful bloodlines, and the roots of hatred behind the present crisis come into focus.

dialogue.speaker: Rocks D. Xebec
dialogue.text: Rocks got hit with Domi Revers!!!

dialogue.speaker: Rocks D. Xebec
dialogue.text: Rocks!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Our attacks didn't even face that spider thing?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What in the world???

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: How obstinate...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Weez...weez

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ya shouldnt scoff at humans, ya beast!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Day D. Jones!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's the name of the previous King of the World!

dialogue.speaker: King Harald
dialogue.text: Insolent fool! That Wretch was never king...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Not for a single moment! Thou hast no place in the fate that binds Mu and Dave!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Then ya shouldn't be so scared!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It's just a name, after all!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ya been afraid for a long time, haven't ya?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Afraid that one day someone's gonna inherit day's will and fulfill the promise...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I WONDER WHO SCARES YA MOST!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: DAVE D. Jones?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: JoyBoy?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: cease this Babble!! They shall never resurface...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: So long as thou FADES into OBLIVION!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: DAY... Mu has found the perfect soldiers now...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A certain nation of gentle and inclusive giants.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Giants? ya bastard!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Stay away from Harald!! He just wants peace!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Indeed, this is an unprecedented opportunity...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A sovereign this pliable may never appear again.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Ya little!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: THE CURRENT DEPOSITION IS QUITE SIMILAR! NOW, MAKE HASTE!

summary: This part advances Elbaf’s Violent Past through 28 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
